hooks.command: FOUND=; for PYBIN in python3 python py; do "$PYBIN" -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && { FOUND=1; break; }; done; [ -n "$FOUND" ] || exit 0; PROJECT_ROOT="${CODEX_PROJECT_DIR:-${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}}"; if [ -z "$PROJECT_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/.codex/hooks/book_codex_hook.py" ]; then SEARCH_DIR="$PWD"; while [ "$SEARCH_DIR" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$SEARCH_DIR/.codex/hooks/book_codex_hook.py" ]; do SEARCH_DIR="$(dirname "$SEARCH_DIR")"; done; PROJECT_ROOT="$SEARCH_DIR"; fi; case "$PROJECT_ROOT" in ""|/) exit 0;; esac; HOOK="$PROJECT_ROOT/.codex/hooks/book_codex_hook.py"; [ -f "$HOOK" ] || exit 0; CODEX_PROJECT_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT" "$PYBIN" "$HOOK" session-start
